channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: RFK Jr. Removes Leaders of Key U.S. Preventive Health Panel
item.description:
Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. dismissed the two vice chairs of the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force on May 11, deepening fears of political interference in a panel that determines what preventive care Americans receive at no cost.

Key points:
• RFK Jr. removed Dr. John Wong and Dr. Esa Davis from the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force before their terms expired.
• The panel helps decide which preventive services, including screenings and counseling, insurers must cover at no cost under federal law.
• Health experts and medical organizations warned the move could weaken the panel’s scientific independence and credibility.
• The dismissals come after postponed task force meetings and delays in updates to major preventive health guidelines.

Read the full article: RFK Jr. Removes Leaders of Key U.S. Preventive Health Panel

item.title: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?
item.description:
Inside the OCIF "Croqueta Fee" allegations involving Natalia Zequeira, Allied Fleet Services, AAA Car Rental, and Puerto Rico's financial regulator.

Read the full article: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
